prompt: SUBJECT: an ornamental corner medallion for a vintage Chinese poster border, in the style of 1920s Shanghai advertising posters: a compact cluster of peony blooms in blush-pink and coral with fresh green leaves and a few small golden plum blossoms, composed as a QUARTER-CIRCLE corner piece that reads correctly in the top-left corner of a frame - dense at the corner point, tapering along both arms. STYLE: hand-tinted chromolithograph engraving matching the attached voucher's illustration style - warm ochre-sepia linework, flat natural color washes, no photorealism. FRAMING (critical): the ENTIRE medallion fully inside the frame with a wide empty margin of at least 15 percent on ALL four sides; nothing may touch or be cut off by any edge. GROUND: fully transparent background, nothing else; no text, no border lines, no shadow, no yellow or gold color cast.
